This is a part of a monster series.

Basically, during the early 1900s, a portal to a collapsing world let in many creatures(Demi humans, dullahans, elves, etc). Magic doesn’t exist still, just the capabilities of these creatures still remain(like how a dullahan can still have their soul fire, how a Demi human lion has extra strength, etc).
